title: How to get a police certificate - Guatemala - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Guatemala
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of all the documents you need
- Constancia de antecedentes policiales
- Carencia de antecedentes penales

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### Constancia de antecedentes policiales
Apply online (available in Spanish only) through the Policía Nacional Civil.

#### If you can’t apply online
You must apply in person at  the Sede Central y Comisarías de la Policía Nacional Civil (check Contact information for locations).

#### If  you can’t apply online or in person
You can authorize  a lawyer to act on your behalf. Your lawyer must submit your original  identification documents.
Review the application requirements and  portal instructions (available  in Spanish only) for more information about applying online and in person.

### Carencia  de antecedentes penales
Apply  online or by using the OJMovil portal (available in Spanish only) through  the Organismo Judicial (website and portal available in Guatemalan  territory only at this time).

#### If you can’t apply online
You must apply in person at the Certificado de  Antecedentes Policíacos (secretariat of criminal records) (check Contact information for locations).

#### If you can’t apply online or in person
You  can authorize a lawyer to act on your behalf. Your lawyer must submit  your original identification documents.
Review the application requirements and procedures (available in Spanish only) for more information about applying online  and in person.

### Constancia de antecedentes  policiales
Locations to apply in person are available on the Gobierno de Guatemala (Government of  Guatemala) website (available in Spanish only).

### Carencia de antecedentes penales
Locations to apply in person are available on the Organismo Judicial website (available in Spanish  only and available in Guatemalan territory only at this  time).

### For questions or enquiries
Criminal  Records Department Edificio  Jade, 7a Ave. 9-20, Zona 9, Guatemala City. WhatsApp  (+502) 3029 0674, (+502) 3029 6954, Monday to  Friday from 8:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m Email: unapelectronico@oj.gob.gt
